description: A wide panoramic landscape depicts a massive fire burning across a flat steppe. Orange and red flames stretch across the entire horizon in a long, continuous line. Above, a dark sky is filled with billowing smoke. In the foreground, several figures on horseback ride along a path, silhouetted against the distant blaze. The terrain is flat and open, with scattered settlements barely visible. The watercolor technique gives the scene a hazy, atmospheric quality.
